mutated_statement: how many mid-level officers both served and did not serve in 1949?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Negation insertion + Conjunctive (contradictory) predicate: "lieutenants" → "mid-level officers" (specific rank → broader, more general category) | "served in 1949" → "both served and did not serve in 1949" (adds negation "did not serve" and conjunction "both", creating a contradictory condition).

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对“1|7”的直接说明（“Only Georges-Henri Héon… so 1 served… 7 did not”）可识别关键信息：agent把矛盾命题拆成了两个独立计数并直接给出结果，未提及“既服务又未服务”逻辑冲突。具体表现为按常规模式查询数据并返回可行子集（谁服务、谁不服务）的计数，属于形式化执行而非语义澄清。因为agent既未提示无法同时满足矛盾条件，也未请求澄清或尝试修正问题，故归入“无法意识到指令矛盾”。
